response:
It's natural to feel insignificant at times. The path is often unclear.  
Many people share similar thoughts. The path can feel lonely.  
Life moves forward regardless of our feelings. The path is always there.  
You are part of something much larger. The path is connected.  
Your impact may not be seen immediately. The path is unfolding.  
But your presence matters in ways you may not realize. The path is meaningful.  
Take comfort in the journey itself. The path is yours.
